name: Triangle
description: A shape with 3 straight sides and 3 corners.

name: Square
description: A shape with 4 equal straight sides and 4 corners.
funFact: All 4 sides of a square are the same length!

name: Rectangle
description: A shape with 4 straight sides (longer and shorter pairs) and 4 corners.
realWorldExamples: 📱 phones, 🚪 doors, <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:-2px;"><path d="M12 5C10 3 6 3 3 4v16c3-1 7-1 9 1 2-2 6-2 9-1V4c-3-1-7-1-9 1z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.1"/><line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="21"/></svg> books
funFact: A square is actually a special rectangle!

name: Rhombus
description: A diamond-shaped figure with 4 equal sides and 4 corners.
funFact: A rhombus looks like a diamond tilted on its side!

name: Trapezoid
description: A shape with 4 sides (one pair of parallel sides) and 4 corners.
realWorldExamples: 🪣 buckets, <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" style="vertical-align:-2px;"><path d="M9 18h6M10 21h4"/><path d="M12 2a7 7 0 00-4 12.7V17h8v-2.3A7 7 0 0012 2z" fill="currentColor" opacity="0.15"/><path d="M12 2a7 7 0 00-4 12.7V17h8v-2.3A7 7 0 0012 2z"/></svg> lampshades
funFact: A trapezoid has one pair of parallel sides!

name: Pentagon
description: A shape with 5 straight sides and 5 corners.
realWorldExamples: <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" style="vertical-align:-2px;"><polygon points="12,2 15,9 22,9.5 17,14.5 18.5,22 12,18 5.5,22 7,14.5 2,9.5 9,9"/></svg> star centers, 🏠 house shapes

name: Hexagon
description: A shape with 6 straight sides and 6 corners.
funFact: Bees build hexagons because they fit together perfectly!

name: Oval
description: A stretched circle with no straight sides or corners.
funFact: The word 'oval' comes from the Latin word for egg!

name: Circle
description: A round shape with no straight sides or corners.
funFact: A circle has no beginning and no end!
